title: AI in Energy Distribution Market to Reach US$ 42.7 Billion by 2033 Expands Amid Grid Modernization and Renewable Integration - Persistence Market Research
description: The global AI in energy distribution market is growing rapidly, expected to be valued at around US$ 7.1 billion in 2026 and projected to reach US$ 42.7 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 29.2% in the coming years.
